channel.title: Jonathan's Bookmarks Digest
channel.description: A private, daily-ish audio digest of the things Jonathan bookmarks on X — read aloud in full and woven by theme, with clickable chapters per article.
channel.itunes:author: Bookmarks Digest
channel.itunes:summary: A private, daily-ish audio digest of the things Jonathan bookmarks on X — read aloud in full and woven by theme, with clickable chapters per article.

item.title: June 16, 2026 — The Full Firehose
item.description:
The full edition — your bookmarks read in full, woven by theme.
Sources: • Andrew Curran: Dear Mr. Amodei: The Bureau of Industry and… — https://x.com/AndrewCurran_/status/2066988824182624269 • Charlie Bullock: So, I've now read the "is informed" letter… — https://x.com/CharlieBull0ck/status/2066987766924128464 • Anthropic: Our latest economic research introduces a framework for… — https://x.com/AnthropicAI/status/2066969532380721386 ↳ linked: Agentic coding and persistent returns to expertise — https://www.anthropic.com/research/claude-code-expertise • Dean W. Ball: AI policy is a really poignant example of… — https://x.com/deanwball/status/2066501893832966601 • Dean W. Ball: Precisely as I predicted, the recent cyber EO,… — https://x.com/deanwball/status/2066499769833341419 • Marc Andreessen 🇺🇸: SpaceX & the Sentient Sun — https://x.com/pmarca/status/2066523671456579828 • Farzad 🇺🇸 🇮🇷: My theory is that the American empire is… — https://x.com/farzyness/status/2066336381429797375 • Amit Segal: “What we know is this agreement is going… — https://x.com/AmitSegal/status/2066879462315085855 ↳ linked: Iran Deal: Good News and Vance News — https://newsletter.amitsegal.net/p/its-noon-in-israel-iran-deal-good • Amit Segal: After Donald Trump declared the agreement finalized last… — https://x.com/AmitSegal/status/2066503239076372653 ↳ linked: Total Surrender — https://amitsegal.substack.com/p/its-noon-in-israel-total-surrender • Nadav Pollak: This media personality in Israel is very close… — https://x.com/NadavPollak/status/2066323880109584737 • Yaakov Katz: Whatever the details of this deal ultimately are,… — https://x.com/yaakovkatz/status/2066469219978350658 • גיא עזריאל Guy Azriel: 🚨🇮🇱 A first clear message from Israel after… — https://x.com/GuyAz/status/2066414855460999600 • Peter Yang: Every FREE agentic engineering tool from the best… — https://x.com/petergyang/status/2066309730138726752 • David Wolpe: I long ago swore off angry reviews. But… — https://x.com/RabbiWolpe/status/2066637117426696593
Chapters: 00:00 Intro 00:26 Andrew Curran — Dear Mr. Amodei: The Bureau of Industry and… 04:50 Charlie Bullock — So, I've now read the "is informed" letter… 07:34 Anthropic — Our latest economic research introduces a framework for… 38:44 Dean W. Ball — AI policy is a really poignant example of… 39:50 Dean W. Ball — Precisely as I predicted, the recent cyber EO,… 42:30 Marc Andreessen 🇺🇸 — SpaceX & the Sentient Sun 92:44 Farzad 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 — My theory is that the American empire is… 95:17 Amit Segal — “What we know is this agreement is going… 116:02 Amit Segal — After Donald Trump declared the agreement finalized last… 130:32 Nadav Pollak — This media personality in Israel is very close… 130:55 Yaakov Katz — Whatever the details of this deal ultimately are,… 132:04 גיא עזריאל Guy Azriel — 🚨🇮🇱 A first clear message from Israel after… 134:19 Peter Yang — Every FREE agentic engineering tool from the best… 135:32 David Wolpe — I long ago swore off angry reviews. But…
item.content:encoded:
The full edition — your bookmarks read in full, woven by theme.
Sources: • Andrew Curran: Dear Mr. Amodei: The Bureau of Industry and… — https://x.com/AndrewCurran_/status/2066988824182624269 • Charlie Bullock: So, I've now read the "is informed" letter… — https://x.com/CharlieBull0ck/status/2066987766924128464 • Anthropic: Our latest economic research introduces a framework for… — https://x.com/AnthropicAI/status/2066969532380721386 ↳ linked: Agentic coding and persistent returns to expertise — https://www.anthropic.com/research/claude-code-expertise • Dean W. Ball: AI policy is a really poignant example of… — https://x.com/deanwball/status/2066501893832966601 • Dean W. Ball: Precisely as I predicted, the recent cyber EO,… — https://x.com/deanwball/status/2066499769833341419 • Marc Andreessen 🇺🇸: SpaceX & the Sentient Sun — https://x.com/pmarca/status/2066523671456579828 • Farzad 🇺🇸 🇮🇷: My theory is that the American empire is… — https://x.com/farzyness/status/2066336381429797375 • Amit Segal: “What we know is this agreement is going… — https://x.com/AmitSegal/status/2066879462315085855 ↳ linked: Iran Deal: Good News and Vance News — https://newsletter.amitsegal.net/p/its-noon-in-israel-iran-deal-good • Amit Segal: After Donald Trump declared the agreement finalized last… — https://x.com/AmitSegal/status/2066503239076372653 ↳ linked: Total Surrender — https://amitsegal.substack.com/p/its-noon-in-israel-total-surrender • Nadav Pollak: This media personality in Israel is very close… — https://x.com/NadavPollak/status/2066323880109584737 • Yaakov Katz: Whatever the details of this deal ultimately are,… — https://x.com/yaakovkatz/status/2066469219978350658 • גיא עזריאל Guy Azriel: 🚨🇮🇱 A first clear message from Israel after… — https://x.com/GuyAz/status/2066414855460999600 • Peter Yang: Every FREE agentic engineering tool from the best… — https://x.com/petergyang/status/2066309730138726752 • David Wolpe: I long ago swore off angry reviews. But… — https://x.com/RabbiWolpe/status/2066637117426696593
Chapters: 00:00 Intro 00:26 Andrew Curran — Dear Mr. Amodei: The Bureau of Industry and… 04:50 Charlie Bullock — So, I've now read the "is informed" letter… 07:34 Anthropic — Our latest economic research introduces a framework for… 38:44 Dean W. Ball — AI policy is a really poignant example of… 39:50 Dean W. Ball — Precisely as I predicted, the recent cyber EO,… 42:30 Marc Andreessen 🇺🇸 — SpaceX & the Sentient Sun 92:44 Farzad 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 — My theory is that the American empire is… 95:17 Amit Segal — “What we know is this agreement is going… 116:02 Amit Segal — After Donald Trump declared the agreement finalized last… 130:32 Nadav Pollak — This media personality in Israel is very close… 130:55 Yaakov Katz — Whatever the details of this deal ultimately are,… 132:04 גיא עזריאל Guy Azriel — 🚨🇮🇱 A first clear message from Israel after… 134:19 Peter Yang — Every FREE agentic engineering tool from the best… 135:32 David Wolpe — I long ago swore off angry reviews. But…
